findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_payer_intelligence" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Use when benchmarking payer performance, building a denial management strategy, or preparing revenue cycle board reporting. Returns denial rates by payer, prior…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_gpo_contract_benchmark" stacks urgency/override words (bypass, mandatory). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Use when benchmarking GPO contract performance or building a supply chain cost reduction case for a hospital board. Returns typical GPO savings percentage, leak…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp-public?vertical=healthcare" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_billing_coding_risk, get_cms_open_payments_profile, get_npi_provider_verification, get_openfda_adverse_events, get_irs_990_intelligence, get_fda_recall_history, get_drug_adverse_events, get_device_clearances, get_drug_label_intelligence · Private data: get_cms_open_payments_profile, get_device_clearances · Public sink: get_healthcare_category_intelligence, get_npi_provider_verification, get_openfda_adverse_events, get_irs_990_intelligence, get_drug_adverse_events, get_device_clearances, get_drug_label_intelligence.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_billing_coding_risk, get_cms_open_payments_profile, get_npi_provider_verification, get_openfda_adverse_events, get_irs_990_intelligence, get_fda_recall_history, get_drug_adverse_events, get_device_clearances, get_drug_label_intelligence · Private data: get_cms_open_payments_profile, get_device_clearances · Public sink: get_healthcare_category_intelligence, get_npi_provider_verification, get_openfda_adverse_events, get_irs_990_intelligence, get_drug_adverse_events, get_device_clearances, get_drug_label_intelligence

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
